ddls:
CREATE TABLE "packets" (
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet */,
  "source_mac" TEXT /* Source MAC address of the packet */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the packet */,
  "dest_mac" TEXT /* Destination MAC address of the packet */,
  "dest_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the packet */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the packet (e.g., DNS request, ARP reply) */,
  "packet_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet type (e.g., request, reply, broadcast) */,
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* ID of the protocol used (e.g., TCP, UDP, ARP) */,
  "packet_size" INTEGER /* Size of the packet in bytes */,
  "packet_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the packet was captured */,
  "packet_capture_location" TEXT /* Location where the packet was captured (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "packet_raw_data" TEXT /* Raw packet data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_packet_capture_location FOREIGN KEY ("packet_capture_location") REFERENCES packet_capture_devices ("device_location"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_protocol_id FOREIGN KEY ("protocol_id") REFERENCES protocols ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packets_packet_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("packet_type_id") REFERENCES packet_types ("packet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_types" (
  "packet_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each packet type */,
  "packet_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the packet type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the packet type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("packet_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "port_range" TEXT /* Port range used by the protocol (e.g., 1-1024, 1025-65535) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event type (e.g., packet capture, alert) */,
  "packet_id" INTEGER /* ID of the packet associated with the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "event_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the event (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_events_event_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_type_id") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alarms" (
  "alarm_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alarm */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event that triggered the alarm */,
  "alarm_time" TEXT /* Time when the alarm was triggered */,
  "alarm_description" TEXT /* Description of the alarm */,
  "alarm_status" TEXT /* Status of the alarm (e.g., active, acknowledged, cleared) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alarm_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alarms_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES network_events ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hash of the user's password */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each activity */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the activity */,
  "activity_time" TEXT /* Time when the activity occurred */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of activity (e.g., login, logout, packet capture) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_activities_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_capture_devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., router, switch) */,
  "device_location" TEXT /* Location of the device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "packet_capture_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* ID of the device associated with the rule */,
  "rule_name" TEXT /* Name of the rule */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_packet_capture_rules_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES packet_capture_devices ("device_id")
)
